---
title: "clean"
subtitle: "A Touying theme for Quarto"
format:
  touying-typst:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        #import "@preview/touying-quarto-clean:0.2.0": *
    theme-typst: clean-theme
author:
  - name: Your Name
    orcid: 0000-0002-1825-0097
    email: you@example.org
    affiliations: Your Institution
date: today
date-format: long
# Fetch the clean theme's default fonts so the deck renders identically on any
# machine (e.g. CI) without them installed system-wide.
brand:
  typography:
    fonts:
      - family: Roboto
        weight: [100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600, 700]
        style: [normal, italic]
        source: google
      - family: Fira Code
        weight: [100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600, 700]
        source: google
    base: Roboto
    headings: Roboto
    monospace:
      family: Fira Code
      size: 0.9em
---

{{< include _slides.qmd >}}
